title: Chiltern Arts 8 Tubes of Assorted Colour Acrylic Paint - Tubes 120 ml (Pack of 8)
features: Water based paint which is fast drying and becomes water resistant when dry
Suitable for use on paper/ canvas/ card/ board/ wood etc
Colours: black, Green, red, yellow, white, brown, blue and orange
It can be diluted with water to create a water colour effect or used straight from the tube for an oil paint effect colours can be easily mixed
